title: Hypixel Skyblock Essentials
description: A complete modpack tailored for Hypixel Skyblock on Minecraft 1.21. Includes all the essential quality-of-life, performance, and utility mods you need to optimize your gameplay—without breaking the server rules.
body:
## About
**Hypixel SkyBlock Essentials** is a comprehensive and performance-optimized modpack tailored for playing Hypixel SkyBlock on Minecraft 1.21.  
It bundles everything needed for a smoother, more enjoyable experience.

Whether you're grinding Slayers, exploring Dungeons, flipping items on the Bazaar, or building your island, this pack includes a curated set of mods, shaders, and resource packs to enhance every aspect of gameplay.

---

## Core Features

### SkyBlock-Specific Utilities
- SkyHanni 
- Firmament
- Skyblocker
- Aaron’s Mod
- Chat patches and overlays

### Performance Boosters
- Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Krypton, ImmediatelyFast
- Very Many Players (VMP)
- Super Fast Math, TT20 (TPS Fixer)

### Visual Enhancements
- Iris Shaders
- Miniature Shader
- Visual Vibrance
- 3D Skin Layers

### Quality-of-Life Improvements
- FastQuit, Centered Crosshair, Zoomify
- Scrollable Tooltips, Chest Search Bar
- Gamma Utils, Remove Reloading Screen
- No Resource Pack Warnings, Borderless Fullscreen

### Diagnostic & Crash Handling
- Not Enough Crashes, Debugify
- ThreatenGL, AsyncParticles, Async

### Mod Configuration Support
- Mod Menu, Cloth Config, YACL
- Ukulib, Fzzy Config, Architectury API

### Extra Enhancements
- Entity Culling, Hidden Recipe Book
- Model Gap Fix, Chat Heads
- Sound Controller, Fast IP Ping
- Fishing Rod Fix, Collision Fix
- WorldEdit and Litematica support

---

## Technical Details

- **Mod Loader:** Fabric 1.21.5  
- **Shader Support:** Iris Shaders  
- **Dependencies:** All required mods and libraries are embedded  
- **Resource Packs:** Looshy
- **Setup:** Ready to play out of the box — no additional configuration required

---

## License & Attribution

Please respect the licenses of individual mods included in this pack.  
This is a curated distribution and does not claim ownership over any included mods, shaders, or assets.
